title: Ragdoll Reactions
description: Players ragdoll in reaction to the world around them! Crashes, sudden stops, and more!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PjaFKqUSMuI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### What sets it off
- Crashing!
- Getting run over!
- Sharp direction changes!
- Explosions!
- More to come!
  
### Requirements
- Minecraft 1.21.1
- NeoForge 21.1.219+
- Sable
- Sable Player Ragdoll

### Everything is tunable in the server config:

- Master on/off switch
- Sensitivity
- Launch-speed clamp
- Re-trigger cooldown
- Whether creative players are affected
